data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic notifications to qualified substitutes when a cancellation occurs. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The linked use case outlines the need for such notifications but lacks specific evidence of their execution, leading to a clear gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of automatic notifications being sent to qualified substitutes upon cancellation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
